## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Logs go to stderr only (stdout is reserved for the MCP protocol)
- [ ] New/changed tools have a `title`, `description`, and Zod `inputSchema`
- [ ] Updated the relevant `README.md` (root table and/or server docs)
